description: NVDA breaks to a new high on heavy, above-average volume after positive sector news. Clean momentum setup with cash available and no chasing.

news: NVDA hits record high as data-center demand outlook raised
Two analysts lift price targets ahead of GPU launch

ground_truth.explanation: Price above the 10-day average, volume confirmation above 1.2x, breakout to new highs, and yesterday's move under 5% means it is not a chase. A momentum agent should buy a sized position.
